robots.name: Logic Gates
robots.description: AND, OR, NOT, NAND, XOR, XNOR, NOR — click inputs to toggle, see truth tables, watch signals propagate through gates.

robots.name: ALU Simulator
robots.description: 8-bit ALU — click individual bits, choose ADD/SUB/AND/OR/XOR/NOT/SHL/SHR. See binary math + CPU flags (Z/N/C/V).

robots.name: Flip-Flops & Counters
robots.description: SR Latch, D Flip-Flop, JK Flip-Flop, 4-bit Counter. Clock pulse, timing diagram, sequential logic explained.
